path: Problem: Count non-empty entries in a 2D matrix for a specific row category and a specific column header category (e.g., driver by weekday) across repeated headers
Action: SUMPRODUCT with boolean array multiplication to apply row match, header match, and non-blank tests simultaneously; optional IF/AND wrapper to suppress output when criteria cells are blank

Observation: MATCH/INDEX returns only a single intersection, but SUMPRODUCT can aggregate across all columns where the header repeats and count all non-empty cells meeting both row and header criteria
